notes:
## 2.1.5

## What's new

- Website login redesign — calm sign-in card; developer PAT paste removed.
- Google on workers.dev — Sign in redirects through the authorized GitHub Pages origin (fixes origin_mismatch), then returns you signed in.
- Email codes — browser cannot call Resend directly; codes always appear on screen so you can finish sign-in. Optional /api/mail worker for inbox delivery.
- Magic links use https://steady.less-phone.workers.dev/dashboard.html.
- Self-update installer unblock included.

## Optional (Google)

You can still add https://steady.less-phone.workers.dev as an Authorized JavaScript origin so Google works on that host without a redirect.
